Who We Are

Welcome To CTIAR

CTIAR stands as a premier leader among Knowledge Enterprises in the 21st century, combining the expertise of accomplished professionals with a relentless drive for excellence. Our brand serves as a critical bridge between Academia and the Information Technology industry, empowering our clients to master each element of their domain and offer innovative, globally recognized solutions.

We don’t just focus on certifications — we nurture out-of-the-box thinking and encourage the exploration of every opportunity. By offering a unique blend of Software Services, Training, Certification, and Mentoring, we enable our clients to excel in both theory and practice.

With our diverse combination of scientific expertise, creative vision, and business intelligence, we are a fast-growing organization committed to driving real results. We are confident that our partnership will unlock significant value for your organization, enhancing your strategic business solutions and driving long-term success.

OUR HISTORYOUR HISTORY

OUR SERVICES

Web Development

When individuals seek specific information, their initial reflex is to visit a website. If the website is visually appealing and well-crafted, it instills trust in the searcher.

Desktop Application

In today’s world, software permeates every aspect of our lives. To tailor software precisely to customer needs, a meticulous software development process is imperative. The primary focus of the Canatech Institute revolves around this.

App Development

In the present age, it’s rare to find someone without a smartphone. Whether it’s an iPhone or an Android device, people rely on a plethora of applications to cater to their interests and requirements. Since carrying a laptop at all times is impractical, mobile applications fill this void.

Digital Transformation

Numerous strategies and techniques are employed to reach a broader audience. Digital marketing has become mainstream nowadays, as it facilitates direct communication with the desired audience. There are various avenues through which this can be achieved.

WE WORK ON

 
 

OUR PRODUCTS

Point Of Sale (POS)

If you’re a retailer aiming to implement a digitalized transaction system for your customers’ purchases, we offer a highly efficient solution. Our system streamlines the payment process for your goods, managing every aspect including sales, returns, discounts, and order cancellations with meticulous attention to detail.

School Management System

In nearly every educational institution, processes have transitioned to digitalization. From attendance tracking to fee submission, various computerized systems are employed. We’ve designed a comprehensive school management system that encompasses all aspects of student records, quiz/assignment tracking, management of school branches, online fee generation, and numerous other functionalities.

High Quality Hardware

We use top-notch hardware to ensure high standard services.

Dedicated 24 / 7 Support

We deliver 24/7 tech support to our customers, so that they do not face any issue.

Agile & Working Style

We follow agile methodology to work fast and efficiently.

Latest Technology

We use latest software standards, tools, platforms, frameworks and technologies.

High Level of Usability

We always develop user friendly apps allowing users to easily operate the app.

Collaborative Consultancy

We are dedicated to provide you full friendly environment to help you achieve what you needed.

Testimonials

Awesome people, great experience, I highly recommend their service.

Noviyanaziz, Business Owner

Amazing!!. I could not have gotten a any better than this. They understood the requirement and implemented as directed in addition to functional and intuitive feedbacks that make this project more complete. Reliable, trusted and always delivers. Will continue with them when ever a project that is needed

Monlen, Business Owner

Very talented and creative designers! Thanks for your work.

Ferguson, Social Media Professional

Working with Davaan was so simple! I appreciated the response time and communication we had together on this project. Doing so, we were able to complete our website in no time at all. I’m so pleased with the result and have already told all my colleagues and friends. Would definitely work with CTIAR again in the future! Got what I needed done in a matter of a few days like they promised! So pleased to have found a web developer that’s reliable!

Tisha Pelletier, Business Owner

The designer did a great job!! Very professional and communicates very well. I am very satisfied with the company’s work. I must say that they were very professional, patient and knowledgeable. I will refer this company and do business again. I promise that you won’t be disappointed if you choose this company for your next project

Chisolu, Business Owner
